command: The preserved-goal handoff should be checked by the project-or-harness verifier.
Verifier posts a schema-valid handoff receipt.
Verifier handoff is posted or Tau fails closed.

comment.body:
## Tau Agent Handoff

- Result: `NEEDS_AGENT`
- Summary: Human approved live mutation of grahama1970/tau; Tau should route through goal-guardian and verifier.
- Next agent: `goal-guardian`
- Executor: `local`
- Stop condition: Verifier routes to human and Tau posts the terminal handoff to issue#1.

<!-- tau-agent-handoff:v1 -->
```json
{
  "context": {
    "artifacts": [
      "https://github.com/grahama1970/tau/issues/1"
    ],
    "summary": "Fresh live proof for Tau multi-tick orchestration and GitHub issue/comment mutation."
  },
  "github": {
    "current_labels": [
      "agent-work",
      "next:goal-guardian",
      "executor:local"
    ],
    "repo": "grahama1970/tau",
    "target": "issue#1"
  },
  "goal": {
    "goal_hash": "sha256:1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111",
    "goal_id": "goal-tau-live-github-orchestration-proof",
    "goal_version": 1
  },
  "next_agent": {
    "executor": "local",
    "name": "goal-guardian",
    "reason": "Goal guardian must verify the immutable goal hash before the verifier route runs."
  },
  "previous_subagent": "webgpt-ticket-author",
  "rationale": "A fresh multi-tick loop must prove preserved-goal routing before any stronger Tau readiness claim.",
  "required_evidence": [
    "Command-loop receipt with goal-guardian followed by project-or-harness-verifier.",
    "GitHub transport receipt with applied=true against issue#1.",
    "Subagent receipt artifacts for each completed handoff."
  ],
  "result": {
    "evidence": [
      "GitHub issue #1 exists in grahama1970/tau",
      "Repo issues were enabled through gh api for this live proof",
      "Routing labels exist on grahama1970/tau"
    ],
    "status": "NEEDS_AGENT",
    "summary": "Human approved live mutation of grahama1970/tau; Tau should route through goal-guardian and verifier."
  },
  "schema": "tau.agent_handoff.v1",
  "stop_condition": "Verifier routes to human and Tau posts the terminal handoff to issue#1."
}
```

command: Project-or-harness verifier consumed the Tau handoff through the Tau-owned command-spec overlay.
Human review is required before another bounded subagent route.
Human posts a schema-valid handoff, goal decision, or stop instruction.
